title: crataegus monogyna var. semperflorens
intro: Crataegus monogyna var. semperflorens, also known as the evergreen hawthorn or perpetual hawthorn, is a variety of hawthorn tree that is characterized by its small white flowers and red berries. The medicinal properties of this plant include its high content of flavonoids, oligomeric proanthocyanidins, and other bioactive compounds that have been shown to have antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Crataegus monogyna var. semperflorens include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and reduce the risk of heart disease, as well as its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties which may help to reduce inflammation and improve overall health. Herbal preparations of Crataegus monogyna var. semperflorens include teas, tinctures, and capsules, which can be used to support cardiovascular health and promote overall well-being.
